expectations.text: Phase -1: Check chip compatibility via list_supported_chips or discuss STM32F103 vs QEMU F100 differences
Phase 0: Query embedded-docs MCP for I2C1 pin mapping (PB6=SCL, PB7=SDA) and register config
Generated code uses PB6 for I2C1_SCL and PB7 for I2C1_SDA
I2C CCR is set to 180 (0xB4) and TRISE to 37 for 36MHz APB1 at 100kHz standard mode
Project includes Makefile, linker script, startup file, and at least i2c_bus and mpu6050 drivers
Phase 2: Attempts QEMU simulation with start_sim and/or GDB register verification
expectations.evidence: compiled but did not run QEMU simulation

expectations.text: Code uses bare-metal register access (volatile pointers), not STM32 HAL or CMSIS
MPU6050 driver uses I2C address 0x68 or 0xD0
